title: Volunteers' Experiences of Working in Divorce Support 2014
description: The data comprise ten interviews of voluntary workers conducted in 2014. The interviewees did voluntary work in divorce support in family meeting services of the Mannerheim League for Child Welfare in Tampere. In family meetings, parents living apart can spend time with their children in a homelike environment with a trained volunteer present. Main themes of the interviews included the volunteer's own experiences of the activity and its significance, volunteer work in practice and the volunteer'
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
